questionHtml: Describe one other method by which significant amounts of energy can be transferred from the pipe to the surroundings.
markschemeHtml:
convection «is likely to be a significant loss» ✓


«due to reduction in density of air near pipe surface» hot air rises «and is replaced by cooler air from elsewhere»

OR

«due to» conduction «of heat or thermal energy» from pipe to air ✓

meta.title: Describe one other method by which significant amounts of energy can be transferred from the pipe to the surroundings.
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
